# Maxim Autos

> Maxim Autos is a used car dealership in Skokie, Illinois selling inspected vehicles priced roughly $5,000 to $15,000. Every car includes an independent mechanical inspection report, a CARFAX history report, and a 3 month / 4,500 mile warranty. As an Illinois CVR dealer, Maxim Autos issues metal license plates on the spot, so buyers drive home the same day with no DMV trip.

Key facts: located at 9101 Terminal Ave, Skokie, IL 60077. Phone (847) 510-8947, call or text. Hours: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, and Friday 3pm to 7pm; Saturday 10am to 3pm. Inventory updates from CarGurus roughly every 6 hours.

Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.

## Inventory

- [Current inventory](https://www.maximautos.com/inventory): every vehicle for sale right now with photos, pricing, and mileage
- [Vehicle feed](https://www.maximautos.com/feeds/vehicles.xml): XML feed of current inventory, readable by machines (Google Merchant Center format)

## Buying

- [Financing](https://www.maximautos.com/financing): financing options for all credit levels, including first time buyers
- [Credit application](https://www.maximautos.com/apply): secure online credit application
- [FAQ](https://www.maximautos.com/faq): common questions about buying, warranties, plates, and trades
- [Shipping](https://www.maximautos.com/ship): nationwide vehicle shipping for buyers outside Illinois
- [Sell or trade](https://www.maximautos.com/sell-trade): get an offer for your current vehicle

## About

- [About Maxim Autos](https://www.maximautos.com/about): the dealership, the inspection process, and the team
- [Testimonials](https://www.maximautos.com/testimonials): customer reviews
- [Contact](https://www.maximautos.com/contact): directions, hours, and contact form

## Optional

- [Site in Spanish](https://www.maximautos.com/es/): Spanish version of the inventory, financing, and contact pages
- [Return policy](https://www.maximautos.com/return-policy)
- [Privacy policy](https://www.maximautos.com/privacy-policy)
